SEARCH
Package com.example.lottery.model

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.lottery.model.Event
public class Event extends Object
Model class representing an Event.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Encapsulates all metadata for an event, including titles, dates, and descriptions.
  • Stores references to promotional assets like poster URIs and QR code content.
  • Acts as a Data Transfer Object (DTO) for Firebase Firestore serialization.

Known Limitations:

  • The posterUri field currently stores a local device URI string. For cross-device functionality, this should be replaced with a remote storage URL (e.g., Firebase Storage).

Satisfies requirements for: US 02.01.01: Event creation with promotional QR code. US 02.01.04: Registration deadline management. US 02.04.01: Event poster support. US 02.02.03: Geolocation requirement toggle.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase Firestore serialization.

    • Event

      public Event(String eventId, String title, Date scheduledDateTime, Date registrationDeadline, Integer maxCapacity, String details, String posterUri, String qrCodeContent, String organizerId, boolean requireLocation)
      Constructs a new Event with all required fields.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique ID of the event.
      title - The title of the event.
      scheduledDateTime - The date and time the event starts.
      registrationDeadline - The deadline for entrant registration.
      maxCapacity - The maximum participant capacity.
      details - The event description.
      posterUri - The URI of the event poster.
      qrCodeContent - The content of the promotional QR code.
      organizerId - The ID of the event organizer.
      requireLocation - Whether geolocation verification is required.
